creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
so what's known to me is that OpenVPN dropping privileges does not seem to work properly with DCO enabled (which happens on FreeBSD 14+, 13.x does not have the relevant if_ovpn kernel module), and --disable-dco (or in the .conf file, disable-dco) is a workaround that permits it to run unprivileged for me.

If it doesn't for either of you (Mirosław or José), we need more information about configuration, such as FreeBSD version, DCO, loading status of if_ovpn on FreeBSD 14 or newer.  The usual stuff for proper bug reports.  Thanks in advance.
